# ========================
# Setup
# ========================
exec-once = xsettingsd

exec-once = hyprpm reload
exec-once = waybar
# ========================
# Workspace 1 layout
# ========================
workspace = 1, layout:dwindle
# ========================
# Autostart on workspace 1
# ========================
exec-once = [workspace 1 silent] kitty --title pipes.sh -e pipes.sh -t 0.2
#exec-once = [workspace 1 silent] kitty --title clock -e tty-clock -c -C 5 -f "%H:%M:%s"

cat ~/.config/hypr/workspaces.conf
# Kitty terminal - transparency and blur
windowrule = opacity 0.95 0.95, match:class ^(kitty)$
windowrule = size 1600 1000, match:class ^(kitty)$

# Clipboard
windowrule = float on, match:class clipse-gui
windowrule = float on, match:class xdg-desktop-portal-gtk

# Floating kitty windows for system monitors
windowrule = float on, match:class ^(floating)$
windowrule = size 720 900, match:class ^(floating)$
windowrule = center on, match:class ^(floating)$

# imv image viewer
windowrule = float on, match:class ^(imv)$
windowrule = size 1440 900, match:class ^(imv)$
windowrule = center on, match:class ^(imv)$

# Floating audio control
windowrule = float on, match:class ^(com.saivert.pwvucontrol)$
windowrule = size 900 600, match:class ^(com.saivert.pwvucontrol)$
windowrule = center on, match:class ^(com.saivert.pwvucontrol)$

# Floating bluetooth manager
windowrule = float on, match:class ^(blueman-manager)$
windowrule = size 800 600, match:class ^(blueman-manager)$
windowrule = center on, match:class ^(blueman-manager)$

# Floating network manager
windowrule = float on, match:class ^(nm-connection-editor)$
windowrule = size 800 600, match:class ^(nm-connection-editor)$
windowrule = center on, match:class ^(nm-connection-editor)$

# Application opacities
windowrule = opacity 0.90 override, match:class ^(codium)$
windowrule = opacity 0.95 override, match:class ^(firefox)$
windowrule = opacity 0.90 override, match:class ^(vesktop)$
windowrule = opacity 0.85 override, match:class ^(code-oss)$
windowrule = opacity 0.85 override, match:class ^(Code)$

# Ignore maximize requests from apps
windowrule = suppress_event maximize, match:class .*
